section_schema.name: body
section_schema.default: We create safe products that really work and are designed to make you feel good. Any question about our products? Check if you can find them here or Contact us

section_schema.name: center_image_alt
section_schema.description: Alt text for the center image

section_schema.name: items
section_schema.description: FAQ accordion rows (first item opens by default)

default.question: How long does shipping take?
default.answer: Shipping usually takes 3-7 business days, depending on your location. Expedited shipping options are available for faster delivery. Contact us for any specific shipping inquiries.

default.question: Does my piece come in any packaging?
default.answer: Yes — each order is packed with care using protective materials so your products arrive safely.

default.question: Do you ship internationally?
default.answer: We ship to many countries. Rates and delivery times vary by region; see checkout or contact us for details.

default.question: What payment methods do you accept?
default.answer: We accept major cards and other methods shown at checkout for your region.

fields.name: question
fields.description: Accordion question (shown in the row header)

fields.name: answer
fields.description: Answer copy (plain text; line breaks preserved where supported)
